text:
What’s new in Lightroom? Swipe through to see the latest updates. 

Head to our link-in-bio to update Lightroom today!

A recap of our biggest feature updates from 2025. See how new AI tools like Assisted Culling, Auto Stacking, and smart cleanup save time and accelerate workflows. Comment with your favorite feature 👇.

Lightroom's best pro studio features of 2025. From native Leica & Fujifilm tethering to non-destructive Denoise, Raw Details, and Super Resolution, these updates are built for faster, more precise studio workflows. Comment with the feature you’re excited to try next 👇
How to fix your photos with @lightroom on Mobile #AdobePartner #MadeWithLightroom

Festival szn aka lock-in szn for everyone who wants to get cute pics of their fits, friends, and memories this summer 📸💫 #AdobePartner Here’s how I edit my festival photos with @lightroom on Mobile to get post-ready pics on-the-go, within minutes! #MadeWithLightroom
festival season w/ a little help from @lightroom on Mobile #adobepartner #madewithlightroom

The new and improved features in @lightroom are a game changer. Improved Assisted Culling allows me to sort my images from a shoot or trip in just minutes. Next, I open @adobefirely boards directly from Lightroom and create a mood board to explore different looks and tones for my final image. Then, after a crop, some Light adjustments, and a Color Grade, I tie my photo together with my favourite tool, Masking. #MadeWithLightroom #AdobePartner
how i get my dreamy vintage nyc pics without all the tourists & trash using @lightroom ⭐️ getting THE pic has never been easier~ #AdobePartner #MadeWithLightroom

Chasing the perfect photo through Italy with the help of @lightroom.

From the chaos of Naples to the quiet coastline of Amalfi, I went searching for a moment that felt right. 

When I finally found it, Lightroom on Desktop let me bring it to life exactly how I experienced it. Refining the light, shaping the color, and using precise Masking to guide the focus. 

Every detail, exactly where I wanted it. 

#adobepartner #madewithlightroom

Spring in Tokyo is always busy 🌸 still finding a way to capture the moment… with Lightroom on Mobile 
#AdobePartner #MadeWithLightroom
The cliffs, coves, and coastlines of The Algarve, Portugal through @jojo_wanderlust_’s lens 🌊 #MadeWithLightroom

Being in the water for moments like this is something I’ll never get over. Everything happens so fast and you’re just trying to take it in while also capturing it.

This was shot in really low light, and the photo didn’t come out the way the moment actually felt at all.
I edited this in @lightroom on Desktop and was able to bring it back to something that feels way closer to what it was like being there. 

Shaping the light, cleaning up the grain, and turning a split second underwater into something I can actually hold onto.

That’s what I love about it. Being able to take a moment like this and turn it into something more than just a photo.

#adobepartner #oceanphotography #underwaterphotography� #lightroom #photographyworkflow
